name: heady.tool_dispatch

purpose: Serve /.well-known/mcp.json capability card

purpose: SEP-1686 task lifecycle with retry and expiry

purpose: Tamper-evident audit chain for tool and agent activity

purpose: KV-backed stateless session layer for MCP requests

purpose: DPoP token binding for MCP requests

purpose: Workload identity federation for machine-to-machine auth

purpose: Scoped OAuth gateway replacing static API keys

purpose: Capability-based execution sandbox with validation and redaction

purpose: Live bee capability and load registry

name: heady.swarm_orchestrator
purpose: Expose swarm execution as MCP tasks

purpose: MCP-facing HCFullPipeline conductor interface

purpose: Expose vector memory as MCP resources with caching

name: heady.graph_rag
purpose: Graph retrieval over vector memory and entity links

purpose: Semantic deduplication cache for near-duplicate requests

purpose: Continuous embedding ingest into pgvector/Pinecone

purpose: Aggregate health across MCP servers and nodes

name: heady.telemetry_stream
purpose: Structured telemetry stream for latency, drift, and routing

purpose: Expose 6-signal drift detection and trigger events

name: heady.monte_carlo_gate
purpose: Simulation gate for deploy and pipeline validation
